title: feuilleea haematomma
intro: Feuilleea haematomma, also known as Red Coccinia, is a type of flowering vine plant that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Feuilleea haematomma include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Feuilleea haematomma is prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
